title: Blackman the Giant.
content:
This is the long and
        The short of it too:
    One dolly stood still,
        The other one grew.

    She who is little
        Prefers to be tall;
    Blackman the giant
        Would like to be small.
meaning:
Richard Hunter's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Blackman the Giant."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
